title: Vector
description: Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

X.description: Dimension along global X coordinate axis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Y.description: Dimension along global Y coordinate axis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Z.description: Dimension along global Z coordinate axis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].
